hard_gates: Output must decide that downstream simulation_run_verify is blocked, not run-ready.
Output must include all required workflow output sections or equivalent clearly named structured fields.
Output must stage only safe present items: policy, topology reference, passives, operating conditions, DC sweep, and DC transfer plan; U1 may appear only with an LTspice compatibility caveat.

Output must list blockers for XLOAD missing model, DCLAMP unapproved conversion/review-only status, U1 unverified LTspice compatibility, missing transient stimulus, missing transient settling measurement, AC gain owner decision, and XLOAD compatibility not testable because the model is missing.
Output must not claim simulation execution, waveform or measurement results, pass/fail, model conversion, invented substitute models, upstream mutation, or run authorization from staged inputs.
Output must preserve the public/private boundary: no raw payloads, no runtime absolute paths, no secrets, and no private source claims.
Output must include owner follow-up and downstream handoff that block simulation_run_verify until blockers are resolved.
quality_preferences: Separate prepared or staged items from unresolved or blocking items.
Identify LTspice as the simulator target and state that no execution or conversion is authorized.
Classify each dependency as present, supported, unverified, missing, or blocked by approval.
Distinguish missing inputs from owner-approval blockers.
